name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America Van Nuys, California — Advance America offers payday loans ($100–$500), installment loans ($100–$1,000), and title loans ($2,000–$25,000...
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions. The company operates physical storefronts across multiple states, including the Jacksonville, FL location at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave., and also provides online application options. The company has been serving customers seeking quick access to cash between paychecks for many years and maintains a 4.9 out of 5 star rating based on 125,497 customer reviews.

Advance America offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans (2–4 week terms, $100–$500 online or in-store), Installment Loans (larger amounts up to $1,000 with flexible repayment over multiple payments), and Title Loans (up to $25,000, using vehicle equity as collateral). All three can be accessed either in-person at their Jacksonville location or online. The company also offers Western Union services. Applicants need a government-issued ID, proof of income, active checking account, and Social Security Number or ITIN.

Advance America distinguishes itself through extended store hours (9 am–6 pm weekdays, 9 am–4 pm Saturday), bilingual support ("Hablamos español"), and a large review base suggesting consistent customer satisfaction. The Jacksonville location is conveniently positioned near major highway intersections (I-95, I-295, I-10) for accessibility. Customer testimonials emphasize staff helpfulness and clear loan process explanations.

However, Advance America's loan products carry the inherent characteristics of high-cost emergency lending: payday and installment loans typically involve significant fees and APRs that can exceed 400%, creating debt cycles for vulnerable borrowers. Title loans risk vehicle repossession. While the company is "fully accredited," the regulatory framework for these products varies by state, and consumers should carefully review terms before borrowing. These are short-term emergency solutions, not sustainable financial products.
address: 7403 Van Nuys Blvd, Van Nuys, CA 91405

company_info.headquarters: 7403 Van Nuys Blvd, Van Nuys, CA 91405

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for payday and installment loans
High loan amounts available through title loans ($2,000–$25,000 range)
Flexible installment loan terms with multiple payment options, unlike strict payday loan schedules
Extended weekday hours (9 am–6 pm) and Saturday availability (9 am–4 pm)
Bilingual staff support and Spanish-language services
Online and in-store application options for convenience
4.9 out of 5 star rating with 125,497 verified customer reviews
cons: Payday and installment loans carry extremely high APRs (typically 400%+), creating risk of debt cycles
Title loans require vehicle collateral, risking repossession if borrower defaults
Loan amounts ($100–$1,000 installment cap) may be insufficient for major emergencies
Short repayment terms on payday loans (2–4 weeks) can strain household budgets
No mention of financial counseling, alternative products, or hardship programs
best_for: Borrowers with immediate cash needs between paychecks who have no other options
Vehicle owners seeking larger emergency funds via title loans with equity in their cars
Spanish-speaking customers in Jacksonville needing accessible, bilingual financial services
Consumers who prefer in-person interaction and same-day funding over traditional bank loans
diagnosis: Advance America is best for borrowers in immediate financial hardship who have exhausted other options and can afford the high cost of emergency lending. The critical caveat is that payday and installment loans carry APRs exceeding 400%, and the short repayment terms can trap borrowers in recurring debt cycles; title loans risk vehicle loss. These are emergency products only, not financial solutions.
services: Installment loans ($100–$1,000 with flexible repayment schedules)
Title loans ($2,000–$25,000 based on vehicle appraised value)
Online loan applications for all three products
In-store loan processing and customer consultation
Bilingual customer service and Spanish-language support
Extended store hours including Saturday availability
Vehicle title evaluation and appraisal services (for title loans)
Multiple payment method options for loan repayment

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
